CLINICAL INDEX

Surgical & Therapeutic Treatments

Browse or search our comprehensive medical procedures, microvascular bone reconstructions, and physical rehabilitation programs.

Total Knee Replacement

Complete resurfacing of damaged knee joints with advanced biocompatible metal and polyethylene gliding implants.

Consult Doctor

Partial Knee Replacement

Unicompartmental replacement targeting isolated joint wear to preserve healthy bone and ligaments.

Consult Doctor

Total Hip Replacement

Advanced prosthetic socket alignment to treat severe hip arthritis and restore pain-free walking mechanics.

Consult Doctor

Shoulder & Elbow Arthroplasty

Reconstruction of damaged shoulder/elbow sockets to recover complete athletic and lifting motion ranges.

Consult Doctor

Slip Disc & Sciatica Care

Decompressing pinched spinal nerves utilizing micro-surgical tube systems and localized therapy.

Consult Doctor

Minimally Invasive Spine Surgery

Using tubular retractors and endoscopes to repair spine disorders with tiny incisions and swift recoveries.

Consult Doctor

ACL & PCL Reconstruction

Arthroscopic tendon grafting to reconstruct torn knee cruciate ligaments and recover stability.

Consult Doctor

Meniscus & Cartilage Repair

Minimally invasive suture anchors to repair structural shock-absorbing cartilage tissues in the knee.

Consult Doctor

Complex Fracture Surgery

Expert stabilization using locked anatomical plates and bone pins for compound, shattered, or unstable fractures.

Consult Doctor

Ilizarov External Fixation

Ring fixators engineered for bone loss lengthening, severe skeletal deformities, and chronic bone nonunions.

Consult Doctor

Carpal Tunnel Release

Micro-incision decompression of the wrist ligament to relieve median nerve numbness and restore hand grip strength.

Consult Doctor

Achilles Tendon Repair

Direct high-tensile suture bridges to repair snapped Achilles tendons and recover ankle push-off power.

Consult Doctor

Deformity Correction

Specialized limb lengthening, bow leg correction, clubfoot casting, and congenital scoliosis support.

Consult Doctor

PRP & Injection Therapies

Localized platelet-rich plasma and hyaluronic acid injections to grease arthritic joints and trigger natural recovery.

Consult Doctor

Bone Density & Osteoporosis Care

Bone Density testing and customized medicine regimens to counteract mineral losses, preventing fragility fractures.

Consult Doctor

Physiotherapy & Rehabilitation

Clinical physical therapy programs featuring balance training, electrotherapy, and custom post-replacement rehab pathways.

Consult Doctor
PALLAWI HOSPITAL

Exceptional orthopedic care, children's services, and critical care units in Mancherial, Telangana. Blending clinical brilliance with genuine compassion.
